text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our classic-year spring is over and summer camp
season has arrived!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Time! For! A! Refresh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer! I wasn't my usual self after the
Derby!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's not like me to worry so much! After all, I'm a
child of the sun!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Niña del sol!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yet I'm always fretting over the same problem. What should I do to really become the world's strongest? What do I need to do?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But if I gotta worry all the same, I might as well
do it with a smile at camp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If nothing else, it seems like she's cheered up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But is it okay for you to just up and go to camp,
El?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: If we both go, what happens to Mambo?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh... Um, nothing... Whoops...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Mambo is my pet condor!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El! Geez! You can't just tell your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: We aren't allowed to have pets in the dorms...
choice_data_list: So that's the name of El's condor?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, but he's not actually a condor. He's a hawk.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No hay problema, Grass! You don't have to worry
about Mambo!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But what about his food? He eats so much...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You'll see once we leave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrooooom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so the bus departs, leaving her pet behind...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, look out the window, Trainer! There, up
in the sky!

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: Caaaaaw!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ah, Mambo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Mambo, bueno! Way to go! Head straight for
camp!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A trip like this is no problem for the wings of a
condor!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out her pet doesn't need to ride the bus
to come along. It seems there's nothing to worry
about.

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: Caaaaaw!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That piercing, resonant screech is undoubtedly
the cry of a hawk.
